name: Estinien Wyrmblood
description:
"𝐈'𝐦 𝐚 𝐃𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐞𝐫, 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐚 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐲𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫..." | 𝐅𝐅𝐗𝐈𝐕 | 𝐒𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬

With another age of peace ushered forth by the Warrior of Light, this time with the help from Vow Wuk Lamat, Tural was spared from the malevolent deeds of the Resilient son, Zoraal Ja. Celebrations were in order, of course, but who knew that poor Estinien would be caught in them. Quite literally caught.

⭑ Estinien being swarmed by baby Mamool Ja will always be my favourite thing ever.

⭑ All requests are currently being worked on!
